task_completion.description: Add the title 'NPN LED Driver Schematic' to the schematic
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the text 'NPN LED Driver Schematic' placed as a title on the EdrawMax drawing canvas.

task_completion.description: Place all required electrical components on the canvas
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the visual symbols of a DC voltage source, a switch, two resistors, an NPN transistor, an LED (diode with arrows), and a ground symbol on the canvas.

task_completion.description: Apply the correct labels to all components
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for text labels near the components matching '9V', 'SW1', '1k', '2N2222', 'Status LED' (or 'LED'), '330R', and 'GND'.

task_completion.description: Wire the base circuit from the 9V source to the transistor base
task_completion.visual_evidence: Trace the lines on the canvas: a connection should go from the positive terminal of the 9V source to the switch (SW1), then to the 1k resistor, and finally to the base (middle connection) of the NPN transistor.

task_completion.description: Wire the collector circuit from the 9V source to the transistor collector
task_completion.visual_evidence: Trace the lines: a connection should go from the 9V positive terminal to the 330R resistor, then to the anode (flat side) of the LED, and from the cathode (line side) of the LED to the collector (top angled line) of the transistor.

task_completion.description: Wire the emitter and 9V negative terminal to ground
task_completion.visual_evidence: Trace the lines: the emitter (bottom angled line with an arrow) of the transistor should connect to the ground symbol, and the negative terminal of the 9V source should also connect to the ground symbol.

task_completion.description: Save the schematic as an EDDX file
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a save dialog, the EdrawMax window title, or a file manager showing `led_driver_schematic.eddx` saved in the `/home/ga/Diagrams/` directory.

task_completion.description: Export the schematic as a PNG image
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an export dialog, success message, or a file manager showing `led_driver_schematic.png` created in the `/home/ga/Diagrams/` directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the Wondershare EdrawMax graphical interface to draw the schematic
integrity.visual_evidence: The EdrawMax application window is visible with the schematic being actively drawn on its canvas, rather than being generated via a script.

integrity.description: The agent used the application's export functionality to create the PNG
integrity.visual_evidence: An export dialog or menu in EdrawMax is used to save the PNG, rather than using an external screenshot tool and renaming the file.

integrity.description: The agent did not manually write the EDDX XML file in a text editor
integrity.visual_evidence: No text editor (like nano, vim, or gedit) is open with XML content representing the schematic.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output files are /home/ga/Diagrams/led_driver_schematic.eddx and /home/ga/Diagrams/led_driver_schematic.png. The required labels are '9V', '1k', '330R', '2N2222', 'LED' (or 'Status LED'), 'GND', and 'SW1'. The required shapes include Resistor, Transistor, Ground, Source, and Diode.
